rent.note: furnished 1BR in Miramar/Tambaú beachfront area; range $250–$500 USD

utilities.note: electric + water + internet; $94 avg for 85m² apt; tropical, A/C increases bill

groceries.note: home cooking; NE Brazil markets very affordable; BRL favorable for USD

diningOut.note: local prato feito ~$3–5; beach restaurants affordable; strong seafood scene

transit.note: monthly bus pass ~$71 (~$40 for moderate use); $1/one-way ticket

coworking.note: limited but growing formal coworking; cafes widely used

misc.note: gym, toiletries, entertainment, beach activities, buffer

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. NE Brazil beach destination; Carnival (Feb) and summer (Dec-Feb) see higher demand.

evidence.claim: single person ~$1,075/month on common living costs as of 2026
evidence.quote: You can expect to spend around $1,075 per month for 1 person as of 2026, on common living costs such as housing, food, and transport
Renting a 1-bedroom apartment in the city centre costs an additional $412 on average. The average monthly rent for a 1-bedroom apartment outside the centre is $244

Basic utilities (including electricity, heating, cooling, water, and garbage for an 85m² apartment) cost an average of $94 per month. A one-way ticket for local transport costs $1, while a monthly pass is typically priced at $71

evidence.claim: João Pessoa offers optimal balance between affordable cost and digital nomad amenities
evidence.quote: João Pessoa offers an optimal balance between affordable cost of living and digital nomad amenities
